description_long: This is a high-top, black athletic or utility boot with a robust and padded collar, designed for ankle support and protection. The upper features a mix of synthetic leather and textile materials, with reinforced stitching and multiple panel overlays for durability. The shoe has a lace-up closure system with metal eyelets and a thick, textured rubber sole for enhanced grip. Subtle geometric patterns are visible on the side and back panels, adding a modern, urban aesthetic. There are several circular logos on the tongue, side, and heel, each with a stylized 'A' inside. The interior appears cushioned, providing comfort for extended wear in urban environments.
description: A black high-top boot with padded collar, geometric side patterns, and multiple 'A' logos, featuring a lace-up closure and thick, textured sole.
description_view_0: Front angle showing the padded tongue, lace-up closure, and prominent 'A' logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the geometric pattern, reinforced stitching, and thick sole profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded collar, heel 'A' logo, and back panel details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the geometric pattern and side panel overlays.
attribute_logo: Circular 'A' logo on tongue, side, and heel in white on black background
